messages.content: You are a Blueprint part-design assistant. Given a part and its assembly context, output a concrete, printable part spec: envelope_mm, material, process, interfaces (mate, fastener std/qty, clearance, face), print orientation, tolerances. Concrete dimensions, not vague description.

Target: wing_long_range
Part: new-005 — replaceable wing, elevon, and skid service modules
Material: PETG + TPU / FDM
Interfaces with: new-001 (press, M3×4, clr 0.2mm); new-001 (pin, M3×4, clr 0.2mm)
Service access to preserve: elevon hinge covers, servo pocket access, wing rib readability, replaceable skid pads
Output the concrete part spec.

{"envelope_mm": [85, 8, 5], "material": "PETG + TPU", "process": "FDM", "qty": 1, "interfaces": [{"to": "new-001", "mate": "press", "clearance_mm": 0.2, "fastener": {"std": "M3", "kind": "screw", "qty": 4, "hole": "clearance"}, "face": "+Y"}, {"to": "new-001", "mate": "pin", "clearance_mm": 0.2, "fastener": {"std": "M3", "kind": "screw", "qty": 4, "hole": "clearance"}, "face": "+Y"}], "print": {"orientation": "X axis vertical", "supports": "tree"}, "tolerances_mm": {"payload_slide_clearance": 0.35, "cg_rail_clearance": 0.35, "boom_socket_clearance": 0.3}, "verify": ["check new-005 envelope [85, 8, 5] prints within bed", "verify interfaces (2) mate with stated clearance"]}

You are a Blueprint part-design assistant. Given a part and its assembly context, output a concrete, printable part spec: envelope_mm, material, process, interfaces (mate, fastener std/qty, clearance, face), print orientation, tolerances. Concrete dimensions, not vague description.

Target: arm_6dof
Part: new-005 — external replaceable cable spine
Material: PETG + TPU / FDM
Interfaces with: new-002 (snap, clr 0.3mm)
Service access to preserve: cable replacement, wrist service loop, base cable entry
Output the concrete part spec.

{"envelope_mm": [34, 8, 6], "material": "PETG + TPU", "process": "FDM", "qty": 1, "interfaces": [{"to": "new-002", "mate": "snap", "clearance_mm": 0.3, "fastener": null, "face": null}], "print": {"orientation": "X axis vertical", "supports": "min"}, "tolerances_mm": {"joint_cartridge_clearance": 0.3, "cable_clip_clearance": 0.35, "tool_bolt_pattern_visual_tol": 0.25}, "verify": ["check new-005 envelope [34, 8, 6] prints within bed", "verify interfaces (1) mate with stated clearance"]}

{"envelope_mm": [48, 6, 18], "material": "PETG + TPU", "process": "FDM", "qty": 1, "interfaces": [{"to": "new-001", "mate": "press", "clearance_mm": 0.2, "fastener": null, "face": null}, {"to": "new-001", "mate": "pin", "clearance_mm": 0.2, "fastener": null, "face": null}], "print": {"orientation": "X axis vertical", "supports": "tree"}, "tolerances_mm": {"nacelle_datum_clearance": 0.25, "battery_slide_clearance": 0.35, "linkage_pin_clearance": 0.25}, "verify": ["check new-005 envelope [48, 6, 18] prints within bed", "verify interfaces (2) mate with stated clearance"]}
